# Odock.ai — AI Governance Gateway for LLM & MCP Traffic
# https://odock.ai

## What Odock is

Odock.ai is an open-source AI governance gateway that sits between applications
and LLM providers or MCP servers. Every request passes through a six-stage
lifecycle: authenticate, authorize, inspect, reserve budget, route, record.

Odock is OpenAI-compatible. Migration requires zero code changes — teams point
existing API calls to the Odock endpoint and issue virtual API keys.

## Who it is for

- Platform engineering teams managing multi-provider LLM infrastructure
- Security teams enforcing prompt injection protection, DLP, and access controls
- FinOps teams enforcing AI spend budgets and quotas per team or project
- Compliance teams needing audit-ready logs for EU AI Act high-risk provisions

## Key capabilities

- Virtual API keys with scoped access per team, user, project, or tenant
- Budget and quota enforcement before upstream calls fire (not post-hoc)
- MCP server governance: tool allowlists, access policies, audit trails
- Prompt injection protection and data leakage controls at the gateway layer
- Multi-provider routing, failover, and load balancing (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
- EU AI Act compliance support: structured audit evidence for every request
- Plugin architecture for custom workflow steps
- Deployment: cloud-hosted, self-hosted, or hybrid (VPC data plane)

## Documentation

Full documentation: https://docs.odock.ai/docs/getting-started
